case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHINELLE AUSTIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCP 415.45

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, SHINELLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-17-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, SHINELLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN, SHINELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1642 TURK STREET #310, SAN FRANCISCO,CA. 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, SHINELLE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
